name: Problem Solving Framework — 15 Classic Medium Problems

hook.what_you_will_build: Problem Solving Framework — 15 Classic Medium Problems

key_takeaways: Kadane's algorithm: curr=max(num, curr+num) — max subarray
Stock profit: track minPrice so far; maxProfit=max(maxProfit, price-minPrice)
3Sum: sort + two pointers; skip duplicates at all 3 levels
Product except self: prefix product pass then right product sweep O(n) O(1)
Recognize pattern FIRST: Two pointers? Sliding window? DP? BFS?
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: Time Complexity Communication — practice explaining O notation live.
